signin.title: Sign in to CommandDeck
signin.description: Enter your email to get a login code

verify.title: Check your email
verify.description: We sent a verification code to {{email}}

cli.title: Authorize CLI
cli.description: Allow the CLI to access CommandDeck as {{email}}

errors.server_unreachable: Make sure the server is running.
errors.cli_auth_failed: Failed to authorize CLI. Please log in again.

web.dev_notice: Enter your operator email and continue, then use the verification code configured in your local environment (MULTICA_DEV_VERIFICATION_CODE).

desktop_handoff.opening_description: You should see a prompt to open the CommandDeck desktop app. If nothing happens, click the button below.
